none.justification: Answer A correctly captures most of the struct in order, well beyond the first 20-30 fields, but it visibly stops around the Android driver_cmd area and does not provide all 96 function-pointer pairs. It also claims 101 fields, inconsistent with the verified 96 filled function-pointer fields plus name/desc.

ccodegraph.justification: Answer B is mostly accurate for the fields it shows and explicitly identifies 96 function pointers, but the supplied answer is truncated at `set_mac_addr | n` and omits the remaining tail of the struct. That matches the GT scoring dimension for mostly correct answers that stop before the end, not a full-credit complete listing.

lsp.justification: Answer C lists a long, mostly correct prefix through the Android_P2P section, but it reports only 89 filled fields including the two strings and the evidence cuts off at `.set_noa`. It is clearly incomplete relative to the 96 function-pointer GT, though substantially more complete than the first 20-30-field failure mode.
